aves.notes: Apenas 6 de ~10 ingredientes obrigatorios. Faltam: tongue, spleen, lung, green_tripe, gizzard (opcional). Dados precisam validacao completa com o script de auditoria.

chloride_mg.note: CoFID: Chicken, breast, raw - chloride ~75 mg/100g.

phenylalanine_plus_tyrosine_g.note: Computed: phenylalanine(0.876) + tyrosine(0.844). USDA has tyrosine data for chicken breast.

biotin_ug.note: Frida (Danish): Chicken, hen, flesh only (Food ID 708) - biotin 2.00 μg/100g. Verified.

vitamin_e_iu.reason: sourced from supplement/fortification; excluded from as_fed matrix per formulation_rules

methionine_plus_cystine_g.note: Computed: methionine(0.438, measured) + cystine(0.362, USDA SR Legacy chicken breast). USDA has cystine data.

vitamin_a_iu.reason: sourced from supplement/fortification; excluded from as_fed matrix per formulation_rules

safety_alerts.risk: Contaminação por Salmonella spp. e Campylobacter
safety_alerts.mitigation: Manter congelado a -18°C e garantir manuseio higiênico rigoroso
safety_alerts.message: Contaminação por Salmonella spp. e Campylobacter

metadata.usda_description: Chicken, broilers or fryers, meat only, raw

biotin_ug.note: Chicken heart biotin ~3 μg/100g. Low, similar to beef heart.

vitamin_a_iu.reason: sourced from supplement/fortification; excluded from as_fed matrix per formulation_rules

safety_alerts.mitigation: Adoção de padrões de congelamento profilático a -18°C

metadata.usda_description: Chicken, broilers or fryers, heart, raw

chloride_mg.note: CoFID: Liver, chicken, raw - chloride ~180 mg/100g.

ara_arachidonic_acid_g.note: USDA FDC: Chicken liver, raw - arachidonic acid ~0.17g/100g. Organ meat has moderate ARA.

vitamin_d3_iu.note: CoFID: Chicken liver raw - vitamin D ~1.3 IU/100g. Low but detectable.

biotin_ug.note: Frida (Danish Food Composition DB v6.1): Lever, kylling, rå (Food ID 712) - biotin 210 μg/100g. Cross-verified with CoFID ~232 μg.

epa_plus_dha_g.note: Chicken liver EPA+DHA estimated ~0.12g/100g. USDA has some LC-PUFA data for chicken liver.

vitamin_k_ug.note: Chicken liver vitamin K minimal ~0.3 μg/100g. Not a significant source.

vitamin_e_iu.reason: sourced from supplement/fortification; excluded from as_fed matrix per formulation_rules

methionine_plus_cystine_g.note: Computed: methionine(0.435) + cystine(0.365, estimated from USDA SR Legacy chicken liver amino acids).

vitamin_a_iu.reason: sourced from supplement/fortification; excluded from as_fed matrix per formulation_rules

safety_alerts.mitigation: Protocolo de congelamento padrão profilático a -18°C

safety_alerts.risk: Risco de hipervitaminose A crônica devido à altíssima concentração de retinol (11078 IU/100g).
safety_alerts.mitigation: Limitar a inclusão estritamente a no máximo 5% da dieta formulada.
safety_alerts.message: Risco de hipervitaminose A crônica devido à altíssima concentração de retinol (11078 IU/100g).

metadata.usda_description: Chicken, broilers or fryers, liver, raw

chloride_mg.note: Chicken kidney chloride ~350 mg/100g. Kidney has high electrolyte content.

phenylalanine_plus_tyrosine_g.note: Estimated from chicken organ AA profile.

biotin_ug.note: Chicken kidney biotin estimated ~30 μg/100g. Kidney is high-biotin organ, similar to beef kidney.

methionine_plus_cystine_g.note: Estimated from chicken organ AA profile.

iodine_ug.note: No direct measurement. Estimated from organ hierarchy: kidney highest iodine organ.

vitamin_a_iu.reason: sourced from supplement/fortification; excluded from as_fed matrix per formulation_rules

safety_alerts.risk: Contaminação inerente aos tecidos renais de aves
safety_alerts.mitigation: Congelamento a -18°C e lavagem sanitária recomendada
safety_alerts.message: Contaminação inerente aos tecidos renais de aves

metadata.usda_description: Chicken, broilers or fryers, kidney, raw

chloride_mg.note: Chicken feet chloride ~40 mg/100g. Low electrolyte.

histidine_g.note: Collagen has unique AA profile: very low His.

linoleic_acid_g.note: Chicken feet have skin/fat with moderate LA.

biotin_ug.note: Chicken feet/cartilage biotin ~0.5 μg/100g. Collagen-dominant, very low.

methionine_plus_cystine_g.note: Collagen AA profile: very low Met+Cys.

vitamin_a_iu.reason: sourced from supplement/fortification; excluded from as_fed matrix per formulation_rules

calcium_mg.note: Reflete extração USDA sem fragmentação óssea pesada

safety_alerts.risk: Alto risco de patógenos externos e contaminação de cama aviária
safety_alerts.mitigation: Limpeza extensiva/remoção de garras e recomendado cozimento a 71°C ou exclusão de dietas cruas sem rigor
safety_alerts.message: Alto risco de patógenos externos e contaminação de cama aviária

metadata.usda_description: Chicken, broilers or fryers, feet, raw

chloride_mg.note: Blood chloride ~290 mg/100g. Plasma electrolyte. High.

histidine_g.note: Blood AA: histidine prominent in hemoglobin.

biotin_ug.note: Chicken blood biotin very low ~1.5 μg/100g. Aqueous tissue.

iodine_ug.note: Blood iodine estimated ~3 μg/100g. Transport medium.

safety_alerts.risk: Meio altamente rico e propício à proliferação ultrarrápida de bactérias patogênicas
safety_alerts.mitigation: Fornecer apenas fervido/desidratado ou de abate estritamente monitorado
safety_alerts.message: Meio altamente rico e propício à proliferação ultrarrápida de bactérias patogênicas

safety_alerts.risk: Sobrecarga de ferro devido ao alto teor de ferro heme (40mg/100g)
safety_alerts.mitigation: Controlar e limitar rigorosamente a inclusão para não exceder limites máximos diários de Ferro
safety_alerts.message: Sobrecarga de ferro devido ao alto teor de ferro heme (40mg/100g)

metadata.usda_description: Chicken, broilers or fryers, blood, raw
